summary: Shallow fault validation confirms the first failing boundary is the web entrypoint: httpd is inactive, nothing is listening on 80/443, and localhost HTTPS probes to /algosec-ui/login and /algosec/ fail with connection refused. Short journal evidence shows an intentional httpd stop at 2026-03-28 12:11:13-12:11:14 EDT.
follow_up_recommendations: Recover or start httpd as part of the active lab stop-window flow.
After recovery, rerun the same shallow boundary checks to confirm the HTTPS listener and UI entrypoints return.
